source: Exhibit E — Traditional Store Standard Franchise Agreement (pp.329-386)

clauses.obligation: Non-exclusive right to operate one Domino's Pizza Traditional Store at approved location
10-year renewal; must sign then-current FA (materially different terms possible); not in material default; maintain/secure premises; refurbish/relocate per current standards
5.5% of weekly Royalty Sales, paid via EFT by Thursday on preceding week sales
4% national fund + up to 4% local cooperative (max 9% total); Roll-Up provision allows 2% local redirect to national
Franchisee has primary responsibility; franchisor must approve location and lease terms (Rider to Lease required)
Must build/equip per franchisor standards; open within 6 months of signing FA
Must complete FMS and all required training; supplemental training may be required; franchisee trains own managers/team
Full compliance with Operating Manual; full-time devotion; on-premises supervision; no outside business; 51% ownership minimum; all food/supply standards
$1.5M per occurrence general liability and auto liability; property on replacement cost; workers comp as required; B+ rated carrier; franchisor as additional insured; 30 days notice of changes
Must use Brand Technology (PULSE, GPS, broadband); modifications capped at 1.5% cumulative Royalty Sales (10yr lookback); independent access to all data
Weekly royalty sales reports; annual P&L statements; franchisor has independent access to all computer data
Franchisor may inspect anytime (on-site or remote); franchisee pays for additional inspections due to non-compliance
If DPF breaches and doesn't cure within 30 days written notice, franchisee may terminate with 10 days notice

Material misrepresentation; failure to open in 6 months; bankruptcy; abandonment; child labor; loss of premises; felony/moral turpitude; intentional underreporting; unauthorized assignment; repeated violations; health/safety; anti-terrorism
48hr (insurance); 7 days (marks, food quality, health/sanitation); 10 days (payment); 30 days (all other)
Return Operating Manual; stop using marks and confidential info; assign phone numbers; pay outstanding amounts; de-identify store; make accessible for franchisor operation

Franchisor may purchase store for percentage of Royalty Sales during prior 12 months less deductions; 10% at closing, remainder in 60 monthly installments at prime rate; real property at appraised value
No involvement in any business similar to franchised business, anywhere, during term
1 year post-term; at Store premises or within 10 miles
No unauthorized disclosure of trade secrets or proprietary information during and after term
No restriction on franchisor's right to assign
Requires approval; transferee must qualify; not competing; signs current FA; refurbishes; completes training; pays $1,500; mutual release (subject to state law)
Franchisor may match any offer
Personal representative must submit transfer proposal within 120 days; must transfer to approved party
Franchisee must indemnify franchisor from all claims arising from Store operations including delivery accidents
Not fiduciary, not principal/agent; franchisor not liable for Store operations or employee actions; no joint employer
Laws of state where Store is located
No arbitration or mediation clause; no choice of forum
FA is entire agreement; does not disclaim FDD representations; Operating Manual subject to change; subject to state law
Controlling Person personally guarantees all FA obligations; all other owners guarantee based on ownership interest; bound by noncompete and confidentiality
Neither party liable for delay or failure from circumstances beyond control (acts of God, government, etc.)
